TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Fenglin mki sku Hualien. su'unun kwara glabang lingay 'kiyan ga 127.45 km² (rhyan rinpang glabang lingay 'kiyan ga 1.5 km², rr'an hyan glabang lingay 'kiyan ga 9.08 km²), 1,855 hi ku su'unun kwara alang hi kya, 763 buwan ku kwarakya, tiku sahuy na alang Gyencumin ga 1,120 hi, kyala kwara pinspung s'uli ga 60%. kwara sahuy na alang Gyencumin ga Taywang Gyencumin na Amis ku smrrhu ku pyux s'uli taya kya. ays ptyaw sebu Fenglin ays psgayun 12 ru 6 alang. 6 alang hani ga, Cingaroan , Cirakayan , Cihafayan , Sariwsiw , Tangahang , Cilo'ohay .
S.PHON: *eŋlin mki s~ɕku ħualien. s~ɕuʔunun kwara ɣlaβaŋ liŋaj ʔkijan ɣa ***.** km* (rħjan rinpaŋ ɣlaβaŋ liŋaj ʔkijan ɣa *.* km*, rrʔan ħjan ɣlaβaŋ liŋaj ʔkijan ɣa *.** km*), *,*** ħi ku s~ɕuʔunun kwara alaŋ ħi kja, *** βuwan ku kwarakja, tiku s~ɕaħuj na alaŋ ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *,*** ħi, kjala kwara pins~ɕpuŋ s~ɕʔuli ɣa **%. kwara s~ɕaħuj na alaŋ ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa tajwaŋ ɣjenʦ~ʨumin na amis~ɕ ku s~ɕmrrħu ku pjux s~ɕʔuli taja kja. ajs~ɕ ptjaw s~ɕeβu *eŋlin ajs~ɕ ps~ɕɣajun ** ru * alaŋ. * alaŋ ħani ɣa, ʦ~ʨiŋaroan , ʦ~ʨirakajan , ʦ~ʨiħa*ajan , s~ɕariws~ɕiw , taŋaħaŋ , ʦ~ʨiloʔoħaj .
S.FORM: Fenglin mki sku Hualien. su'unun kwara glabang lingay 'kiyan ga 127.45 km² (rhyan rinpang glabang lingay 'kiyan ga 1.5 km², rr'an hyan glabang lingay 'kiyan ga 9.08 km²), 1,855 hi ku su'unun kwara alang hi kya, 763 buwan ku kwarakya, tiku sahuy na alang Gyencumin ga 1,120 hi, kyala kwara pinspung s'uli ga 60%. kwara sahuy na alang Gyencumin ga Taywang Gyencumin na Amis ku smrrhu ku pyux s'uli taya kya. ays ptyaw sebu Fenglin ays psgayun 12 ru 6 alang. 6 alang hani ga, Cingaroan , Cirakayan , Cihafayan , Sariwsiw , Tangahang , Cilo'ohay .
S.PHON: *eŋlin mki s~ɕku ħualien. s~ɕuʔunun kwara ɣlaβaŋ liŋaj ʔkijan ɣa ***.** km* (rħjan rinpaŋ ɣlaβaŋ liŋaj ʔkijan ɣa *.* km*, rrʔan ħjan ɣlaβaŋ liŋaj ʔkijan ɣa *.** km*), *,*** ħi ku s~ɕuʔunun kwara alaŋ ħi kja, *** βuwan ku kwarakja, tiku s~ɕaħuj na alaŋ ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *,*** ħi, kjala kwara pins~ɕpuŋ s~ɕʔuli ɣa **%. kwara s~ɕaħuj na alaŋ ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa tajwaŋ ɣjenʦ~ʨumin na amis~ɕ ku s~ɕmrrħu ku pjux s~ɕʔuli taja kja. ajs~ɕ ptjaw s~ɕeβu *eŋlin ajs~ɕ ps~ɕɣajun ** ru * alaŋ. * alaŋ ħani ɣa, ʦ~ʨiŋaroan , ʦ~ʨirakajan , ʦ~ʨiħa*ajan , s~ɕariws~ɕiw , taŋaħaŋ , ʦ~ʨiloʔoħaj .
